meaning: adj.容易接受的,感受性强的n.容纳者,容器
examples: If you are submitting your resume in English, find out if the recipient uses British English or American English because there are variations between the two versions.
With so many ways to communicate, how should a manager choose the one that's best—particularly when the message to be delivered is bad or unwelcome news for the recipient?
Gift certificates are personalized with both the recipient and giver names.
The first recipient was the former Bishop of Truro, the Right Reverend Bill Ind.
Of course, after you make the gift the proceeds will belong to the recipient.
